missed_changes: Newly excited about L3s (2024-07-18), not anticipated
Predicted formal verification would become increasingly important in 2025 (2024-12-20)
Endorsed David Sacks as crypto/AI czar — a political/policy stance not anticipated (2024-12-06)
Excited about Murmur Protocol, a 'marketplace for alpha' (2024-12-19) — borders on the speculative-alpha territory he frames as concerning
notes: The infrastructure-excitement claims map cleanly onto the window: Aleo (ZK + privacy), Eigen/Infura (restaking), LayerZero + Espresso (interop/sequencing), Daylight (DePIN/energy), and a clearly risk-on cadence of new deals and launch celebrations. The AI x crypto thesis went unaddressed despite being a 2024 focus. All 'concerned' claims (casino, fragmentation, memecoins) are absent — consistent with his note that excitement and concern are two sides of one coin, but he simply didn't voice the negative side in this window. No claims were contradicted.
